title: jasminum humile var. revolutum
intro: Jasminum humile var. revolutum, also known as the climbing jasmine or star jasmine, is a fragrant, flowering vine native to Asia, characterized by its star-shaped flowers and twisted leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Jasminum humile var. revolutum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote better sleep. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
